revision.comment: new key for [[Category:8th-century religious buildings and structures]]: " +Buddhist temples" using [[WP:HC|HotCat]]
revision.text:
This category is about Buddhist temples built in the 8th century. {{Navseasoncats}}
[[Category:Buddhist temples by century| 08]] [[Category:8th-century religious buildings and structures| +Buddhist temples]] [[Category:8th-century Buddhism|Temp]]

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]

Bot: tidy & size tag (7 members)

Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
revision.text: This category is about Buddhist temples built in the 8th century. {{Navseasoncats}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Uncategorized categories]] [[Category:Buddhist temples by century| 08]] [[Category:8th-century religious buildings and structures| +Buddhist temples]] [[Category:8th-century Buddhism|Temp]] }} [[sn:8th-century Buddhist temples]] [[Category:Categories with 7 members]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories with enwiki]][[en:Category:8th-century Buddhist temples]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]][[Category:tier 3 Categories with enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]][[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[ja:Category:8世紀の仏教寺院]] [[ar:Category:معابد بوذية القرن 8]] [[es:Category:Templos budistas del siglo VIII]] [[fa:Category:معبدهای بودایی سده ۸ (میلادی)]] [[ur:Category:آٹھویں صدی کے بدھ مندر]] [[zh:Category:8世纪佛寺]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
revision.text:
==English Content== This category is about Buddhist temples built in the 8th century. {{Navseasoncats}} [[ar:Category:تصنيف:معابد بوذية القرن 8]] [[ar:Category:معابد بوذية القرن 8]] [[en:Category:8th-century Buddhist temples]] [[en:Category:8th-century Buddhist temples]] [[es:Category:Categoría:Templos budistas del siglo VIII]] [[es:Category:Templos budistas del siglo VIII]] [[fa:Category:رده:معبدهای بودایی سده ۸ (میلادی)]] [[fa:Category:معبدهای بودایی سده ۸ (میلادی)]] [[ja:Category:8世紀の仏教寺院]] [[ja:Category:8世紀の仏教寺院]] [[sn:8th-century Buddhist temples]] [[ur:Category:آٹھویں صدی کے بدھ مندر]] [[ur:Category:زمرہ:آٹھویں صدی کے بدھ مندر]] [[zh:Category:8世纪佛寺]] [[zh:Category:Category:8世纪佛寺]]
==Local Content== {{wikidata link|Q25337499}} [[Category:8th-century Buddhism|Temp]] [[Category:8th-century religious buildings and structures| +Buddhist temples]] [[Category:Buddhist temples by century| 08]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories with enwiki]] [[Category:tier 3 Categories with enwiki]]
